# Contributing to drf-mcp-docs

Please see the full [contributing guide](../docs/contributing.md) for setup instructions, code style, testing, and PR guidelines.

## Quick Start

```bash
git clone https://github.com/Abdulkhalek-1/drf-mcp-docs.git
cd drf-mcp-docs
pip install -e ".[dev]"
pytest
```

## Issues

- [Bug Report](https://github.com/Abdulkhalek-1/drf-mcp-docs/issues/new?template=bug_report.yml)
- [Feature Request](https://github.com/Abdulkhalek-1/drf-mcp-docs/issues/new?template=feature_request.yml)
- [Question](https://github.com/Abdulkhalek-1/drf-mcp-docs/issues/new?template=question.yml)
